case_title: 1357 CLAY STREET,LLC VS. ALEXANDER J HEALY et al

docket_entries.description: QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1357 CLAY STREET,LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HEALY, ALEXANDER J DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-08-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-24-2012

OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER OF DEFT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1357 CLAY STREET,LLC
REPLY TO PLTF'S OPPOS FILED BY DEFENDANT HEALY, ALEXANDER J
ORDER SUSTAINING DEFENDANT ALEXANDER J. HEALY'S DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER HEALY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DECLARATORY RELIEF IS NOT NECESSARY OR PROPER IN LIGHT OF PLAINTIFF'S RENT BOARD REMEDY. (CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1061; DELAURA V. BECKETT (2006) 137 CAL.APP.4TH 542). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-08-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - PER APR-18-2012 ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tom H. Elke, Esq., of Tobener Law Center, Tel. 415.504.2165, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Michael J. McLaughlin, Esq., of Fried & Williams, Tel. 415.421.0100, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

The matter was argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER HEALY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained without leave to amend. Declaratory relief is not necessary or proper in light of plaintiff's rent board remedy. (Code of Civil Procedure 1061; DeLaura v. Beckett (2006) 137 Cal.App.4th 542). Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
